mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_drafts (user_id, type, title, category, event_date, location, description, hidden_feature, images_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{category}, #{eventDate}, #{location}, #{description}, #{hiddenFeature}, #{imagesJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM item_drafts WHERE id=#{id} AND user_id=#{userId}
SELECT * FROM item_drafts WHERE user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM item_drafts WHERE id=#{id} AND user_id=#{userId}
